basics.description:
Deploy **UTL-X Transformation Engine — Professional** into your Azure subscription.

**Professional plan:** 32 worker threads, up to 10 auto-scaling instances. Handles 50+ integrations at ~160K msg/s.

Billing is handled automatically through your Azure bill. A 14-day free trial is included.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for all resources. Choose a region close to your workloads.

options.text: [concat('Suggested admin key (copy this): **', guid(), '**  — Paste it into the Admin API Key field below and save it in a password manager. You can also choose your own key (minimum 8 characters).')]

elements.name: adminKey
elements.toolTip: Protects the Admin API and Web UI. Use the suggested UUID above, or enter your own (minimum 8 characters). Save it securely — it cannot be retrieved after deployment.

constraints.validationMessage: The admin key must be at least 8 characters.

options.text: Save this key securely — it cannot be retrieved after deployment. If you lose it, you can reset it with: az containerapp secret set --name <app> -g <rg> --secrets admin-key=<new-key>, then restart the container.

Professional plan: 32 concurrent worker threads, up to 10 auto-scaling instances. Transforms JSON, XML, CSV, YAML, and OData natively with 652 stdlib functions, schema validation, and pipeline chaining. Ideal for production workloads with multiple integration flows.

elements.name: cpuCores
elements.label: CPU Cores per instance
elements.toolTip: CPU allocation per container instance. With 32 workers, 2.0+ cores is recommended.

elements.name: memoryGi
elements.label: Memory per instance
elements.toolTip: Memory allocation per container instance. With 32 workers processing concurrently, 4 GB+ is recommended.

allowedValues.label: 8 GB — messages up to 1 MB+ (large payloads)

options.text: XML and JSON messages expand 10-50x in memory during transformation (UDM parsing). With 32 concurrent workers, each processing a message, memory usage scales linearly. For messages over 500 KB, use 8 GB.

elements.name: minReplicas
elements.label: Minimum instances
elements.toolTip: Set to 0 for scale-to-zero (no cost when idle, ~10s cold start). Set to 1 for always-on (recommended for production).

elements.name: maxReplicas
elements.label: Maximum instances
elements.toolTip: Maximum number of instances for auto-scaling under load. Professional plan supports up to 10.
